items.title: 4 Reasons to Roll Your Covered Call Option and Keep Your Income Strategy Alive
items.description: Options expert Gavin McMaster explains when and why covered call traders should roll their positions.

items.title: C3.ai's Reset: Why New Leadership Could Spark a Turnaround

items.title: TOURISE 2025 Debuts Agentic Tourism Initiative, Pioneering the Protocol for Intelligent Travel
items.description: RIYADH, Saudi Arabia, November 12, 2025--The Agentic Tourism Initiative was unveiled today at the inaugural TOURISE Summit, introducing the world’s first Agentic Protocol for Tourism, a universal digital framework set to transform every stage of the traveler’s journey.

items.title: CNBC Daily Open: An AI and 'everything else' market in play in the U.S.
items.description: What investors would really like is if fork in the markets merges into one. That tends to be the safer path to take.
